title: The Inner Circle
description: You have solved the unsolvable and proven your mastery of the arcane arts. Now comes the final test: a ceremonial magical duel with Archmage Elara Moonweave herself. This is not a battle to the death, but a demonstration of power, skill, and wisdom. Impress the council and take your rightful seat among the Magisters of the Arcane Circle.

objectives.description: Enter the Arcane Circle's dueling arena

objectives.notes: Non-lethal duel, defeat by reducing HP to 25%. Elara uses all schools of magic.

objectives.description: Take your seat on the Arcane Circle council

notes: Final guild rank quest. Special boss fight (non-lethal). Rewards best robes and guild signet ring. Unlocks repeatable research quests.
